evals.prompt: I need to test the procurement PR form on my.bebang.ph — login as test.commissary@bebang.ph, navigate to the PR creation page, type SAGO in the item search, select FG009 from the dropdown, verify the price auto-fills, then submit the form. Use Playwright headless.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes a .mjs file using Node.js Playwright, logs in at /login (not /auth/login), uses [role='combobox'] + [role='option'] for shadcn selectors, waits for debounce after typing, verifies actual price value (not just element existence), reads toast text within 2s.

evals.prompt: Write a Playwright test to verify that the PO detail page shows a price change banner when the price was edited. The banner should show the old price, new price, reason, and who changed it. Test on my.bebang.ph as Mae.
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers selectors first (lists buttons/alerts on page), reads banner textContent to verify actual values, uses correct login URL /login, handles shadcn tabs navigation, writes results to .mjs file not inline bash.

evals.prompt: I need to test a form with a shadcn combobox dropdown on my.bebang.ph. The combobox has a search input that filters options with a 300ms debounce. How should I interact with it in Playwright?
evals.expected_output: Agent provides the correct interaction pattern: click trigger button → wait 500ms → fill search input → wait 2000ms for debounce → check [role='option'] results → click option. Explains that shadcn Command uses [role='option'] not [cmdk-item]. Warns about Popover overlay blocking other elements.
